findings.evidence: Lines 22-24 claim equivalence from fibre-orbit equality alone; lines 168-172 define `orbitProjEquiv (hp : Function.Surjective p) ...`.
findings.fix: Mention surjectivity in the module summary, matching the later `orbitProjEquiv` statement.
findings.issue: The module doc says the descended map is an equivalence exactly when fibres are deck orbits, but `orbitProjEquiv` also requires `Function.Surjective p`.

findings.evidence: Lines 184-188 document 'any representative' while the theorem statement is only `p ((orbitProjEquiv ...).symm b).out = b`.
findings.fix: Either change the docstring to say the chosen `Quotient.out` representative, or strengthen the lemma to quantify over arbitrary representatives.
findings.issue: The docstring says 'any representative', but `proj_orbitProjEquiv_symm` only states the result for the chosen `Quotient.out` representative.

summary: The added declarations are documented, but two docstrings overstate what the stated results provide.
